title: Training and Operations Assistant
description:
We are seeking a Training & Operations Assistant (Part-Time, 20 hours per week) to support the smooth running of the Elephant Training Institute. This role is ideal for an experienced professional who values structure, consistency and making a reliable contribution within a well-established organisation through part-time, stable work with no long hours.

Key Responsibilities

Training Institute Operations

  • Implement the Director’s plans for the Elephant Training Institute
  • Coordinate and deliver training workshops, seminars and courses
  • Manage course payments and ensure compliance with relevant government systems (e.g. Vendors@Gov)
  • Respond to participant enquiries and compile post-course evaluations and feedback
  • Raise invoices, chase debt and/or track payments through ticketing website
  • Maintain accurate tracking records for confirmed and prospective participants
  • Liaise with trainers and participants on logistics, materials preparation, and printing
  • Source and coordinate external venues, including logistics and catering
  • Maintain the participant database (Mailchimp); draft newsletters and issue communications
  • Maximise access to relevant government grants and subsidies (e.g. SkillsFuture, SSI)

Sales & Marketing Support

  • Maintain relationships with universities, government bodies, professional associations, and private practices
  • Use Mailchimp and digital platforms (LinkedIn, Facebook, Instagram) to promote training programmes
  • Assist with maintaining and updating marketing tools, including the company website

Additional Support

  • Assist with account statements and debt follow-up
  • Provide general administrative and operational support to the Director as required

Skills & Attributes

  • Strong attention to detail and follow-through
  • Excellent organisational and time-management skills
  • Calm, structured, and reliable working style
  • Clear written and interpersonal communication skills
  •  Comfortable using Microsoft and digital systems to support efficient operations
  • Strong alignment with Elephant’s core values: integrity, reliability, and compassion

Preferred Profile

  • Experienced administrative or operations professional, ideally within training, education, healthcare, or professional services
  • Well suited to someone seeking a stable, part-time role with flexibility and meaningful responsibility
  • Comfortable working independently, supporting senior leadership, and maintaining established processes

postedCompany.description: Elephant Therapy & Training is the very first psychotherapy practice in Singapore focused on empowering the community directly through client therapeutic consultations and indirectly through upskilling Asia's community of clinicians and the larger population via a pioneering training centre which delivers relevant workshops and seminars.
postedCompany.name: ELEPHANT PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
